title: intsia bijuga var. retusa
intro: Intsia bijuga var. retusa, also known as the African tree ebony, is a variety of the Intsia bijuga tree native to tropical Africa, characterized by its distinctive dark and dense wood. The medicinal properties of the Intsia bijuga var. retusa plant are primarily focused on its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. The herbal preparations of the plant include a tea made from the bark, which is often used to treat colds and respiratory issues, as well as a poultice made from the leaves to treat skin conditions.
